.file-embed.background: rgb(222, 222, 222) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(222, 222, 222) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(222, 222, 222) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #fff 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#fff, color-mix(in srgb, #fff 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #fff 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#fff, color-mix(in srgb, #fff 65%, transparent))

code.background: rgb(222, 222, 222) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(223, 74, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(223, 74, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(222, 222, 222) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(222, 222, 222) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(222, 222, 222) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(222, 222, 222) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(222, 222, 222) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(222, 222, 222) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(223, 74, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(222, 222, 222) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(222, 222, 222) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(222, 222, 222) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead th.background: rgb(222, 222, 222) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
